name: Sidecar Search
description: Cmd-K replacement popup: fuzzy-ranked search over collections (incl. hidden), views, pages, and hashtags (Tags submenu); inline New/Open/Settings/Create rows; per-collection sub-palette; date jump rows; Shift+Enter opens in other panel. The plugin binds NO global shortcut: bind the native jump palette to any key (My Preferences -> Change Keyboard Shortcuts) and every native jump-palette open (shortcut, buttons, swipe) is redirected here. Type > for the native command palette, + for the native create palette. commandShortcut below is the key that switches from this popup to native commands (Mod = Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere) -- keep it matching your launch_cmdpal binding. To reach true-native jump, disable this plugin.
